name: simplex-ide-backend
description: Express bridge for SIMPLEX assembler and emulator

scripts.compile: g++ assembler.cpp -o assembler.exe -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -static && g++ emulator.cpp -o emulator.exe -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -static
scripts.start:replit: g++ assembler.cpp -o assembler && g++ emulator.cpp -o emulator && node server.js
